# Objective

Create figures and tables for publication.

# Preparation

```{r}
pacman::p_load(ggplot2, modelsummary, ggtext, data.table, dplyr)
```

# Make figures and tables

## Visual illustration of the data
```{r}
#--- read the data ---#
reg_data <- readRDS("data/processed/reg_data.rds")

g_delay <-
  ggplot(reg_data) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = carrier, y = dep_delay)) +
  facet_grid(origin ~ .) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Carrier",
    y = "Departure Delay",
    caption = "Note: The figure shows the distribution of departure delay by carrier for each of the airports."
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.caption = element_textbox_simple(
      hjust=0, size = 10, 
      margin = margin(t = 10)
    ),
    text = element_text(family = "Times")
  )

#--- for WORD ---#
ggsave("results/figures/delay_box.png", g_delay, dpi = 600, width = 6, height = 5)

#--- for PDF ---#
ggsave("results/figures/delay_box.pdf", g_delay, width = 6, height = 5)
```

## Regression table

```{r}
# --- load a list of regression results --- #
ls_reg_results <- readRDS("results/reg_results.rds")

# --- create regression results table --- #
reg_table <-
  modelsummary(
    models = ls_reg_results, 
    coef_map = c(
      "temp" = "Temperature",
      "precip" = "Precipitation",
      "wind_speed" = "Wind Speed"
    ),
    stars = TRUE,
    gof_omit = "IC|Log|Adj|F|Pseudo|Within|RMSE"
  )

# --- for PDF --- #
saveRDS(reg_table, "results/tables/reg_table.rds")

```
